description: A marketing analyst wants to check the performance of an email campaign that was sent yesterday.

nodes.task_description: Log into the marketing analytics platform.

expected_outcome.value: The analyst accesses the reporting tools.

nodes.task_description: Locate the specific email campaign and open its performance dashboard.

expected_outcome.value: The analyst finds the report for the correct campaign.

nodes.task_description: Review key metrics such as open rate, click-through rate, and revenue generated from the campaign.

expected_outcome.value: The analyst can measure the effectiveness and ROI of the marketing campaign.
